name: D/D Reroll
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>リビルド
desc: "Dark Contract" cards you control cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target up to 3 of your other banished "D/D" cards; shuffle them into the Deck.
eff: "Dark Contract" cards you control cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target up to 3 of your other banished "D/D" cards; shuffle them into the Deck.

action: Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck by effect
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
